daily_brief.key_insight: Risk-off regime with 54% breadth and median momentum -0.6%. Raise cash, honour stops, resist bottom-fishing until breadth recovers above 55%. Macro flow is neutral with 154 policy/global items in focus — factor this into position sizing. Sector dispersion is wide: Healthcare leads at 47 while Oil & Gas lags at 1 — a stock-picker's tape.
narrative: Regime: BEAR · breadth 54% · median momentum -0.6% · ATR 2.1%
Macro tone: NEUTRAL from 154 items across 11 sources

conviction_board.name: Larsen & Toubro
conviction_board.narrative: LT scores 51/100 on our engine. The trend is solidly positive — price sits above all key averages, though alignment isn't perfect. Momentum is strong and backed by volume (1.5x average). That's the kind of conviction that sustains moves. Above-average volume (1.5x) adds weight to the move. Market headwinds are real — 54% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. Bull case: sustains above ₹4,216 and pushes towards ₹4,415 as trend followers pile in. Bear case: a slip below ₹4,018 triggers trailing stops and dents the short-term thesis. Needs to resolve ₹4,090–₹4,318 before a directional bet pays. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Neutral.
